summary: Iteration 12: Tested new feature extensions for CANUSA Nexus. All 19 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified for Groups page, ArticleEditor with new features (multiple categories, tags, expiry date, important marking, group visibility), and Articles page (Top 10 removed). Fixed missing 'cn' import in Groups.jsx.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: Groups.jsx was missing 'cn' import from '@/lib/utils' - now added
seed_data_creation: Test data prefixed with TEST_iter12_ was created and cleaned up during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features working: Groups CRUD, multiple categories, tags API, article expiry/important, group visibility. Existing 'Vertrieb' group is available for testing.

user_groups_api.notes: Admin can assign users to groups. Groups are validated before assignment.

tags_api.notes: Returns all unique tags from articles.

articles_multiple_categories.notes: Articles can have multiple categories via checkbox selection.

articles_expiry_date.notes: Expiry date stored correctly. UI shows calendar picker.

articles_important_marking.notes: Important toggle with optional expiry date for marking.

articles_group_visibility.notes: Articles can be restricted to specific groups. Empty = all users.

draft_visibility.notes: Draft articles only visible to creator and admins.

groups_frontend_page.notes: Full CRUD UI with create dialog, edit, delete, members management.

article_editor_features.notes: All new fields present: categories checkboxes, tags input with suggestions, important toggle, expiry date picker, group visibility checkboxes, contact person dropdown.

articles_page_top10_removed.notes: Top 10 section no longer displayed on Wissensartikel page.

light_mode_default.notes: Light mode is active by default. Dark mode available via toggle.

ui_tests_performed.groups_page: Groups page shows existing groups with CRUD actions
ui_tests_performed.groups_create_dialog: Create group dialog has name/description fields
ui_tests_performed.article_editor_expiry: Expiry date and review date pickers
